hero.description: Six authenticated icons, released together. When they're gone, the drop closes — the next opens Friday.
hero.comingSoon: The next drop is being curated. Leave your email below — one email per drop, nothing else.

authenticity.headline: All our products are authentic, verified before they're listed.
authenticity.body: We buy every piece ourselves and inspect it by hand before it enters a drop. Each order ships insured, with its authenticity documentation.

about.label: About us
about.title: Two of us.
about.subtitle: Every piece, chosen by hand.
about.body: ICONISTA is a two-person house — a husband and wife who hunt for luxury pieces across Europe. She curates every drop herself: a handful of pieces, each one bought, inspected and photographed by us personally. No warehouse, no endless catalogue — just what we would carry ourselves, at prices below the boutique.

archive.label: Sold out — gone for good
archive.title: The Archive
archive.description: Every past drop, on record. Each piece was one-of-one — once a drop closes it never returns.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Customer service is online Mon–Sat, 10:00–19:00. Still unsure? Reach us on WhatsApp.
faq.q1: Which countries do you ship to?
faq.a1: We ship to all EU countries, fully insured and free of charge. Delivery takes 2–6 working days.
faq.q2: How do I know products are authentic?
faq.a2: Every piece is bought and inspected by us personally before it enters a drop, and ships with its authenticity documentation.
faq.a3: 2–6 working days within the EU. Every order ships insured with tracking.
faq.q4: How can I make a return?
faq.a4: You have 14 days from the delivery date. Contact us and we'll arrange the insured return shipment.

benefits.shippingBody: Always free on every order, 2–6 working days
